news_items.headline: Latest MVP polls show runaway in both leagues, but others still making noise
Astros Place SS Jeremy Pena on 10-Day IL
news_items.summary: Houston Astros SS Jeremy Pena showed up to Daikin Park today and reported some “left leg discomfort” according to manager Joe Espada. As a result, Pena was kept out of tonight’s 5-4 loss to the Minnesota Twins. After the game, Espada announced Pena would be placed on the 10-day IL with a “mild calf strain”. […]

news_items.headline: Guardians Lose to Old Nemesis Chris Paddack
news_items.summary: In six career appearances against Cleveland, Chris Paddack has a 3.14 ERA. In 114 appearances against every other team in MLB, Chris Paddack has a 4.95 ERA. He led the Rangers to a 6-3 win over the Guardians tonight. After the game, Guardians manager Stephen Vogt said Paddack’s changeup and cutter give their lefties trouble. […]
